prompt: I'm reviewing a pull request on the R-Ladies website repo. The check-build is red and there's a Netlify preview link. How should I review it?
assertions: Says check-build is the gate — fix it first; read the log (bad frontmatter YAML, broken shortcode, or unresolvable image)
Says to read the CI check comments in order
Says to open the Netlify preview and check light AND dark mode
Mentions checking things CI can't (directory photos, byline/directory_id resolution, heading hierarchy, shortcode rendering)
Says the default merge is rebase
Says to watch the production build after merging
Notes using 'request changes' sparingly / kindly for first-timers
